# GG Nagarkar - Canonical Facts and Pages

Primary entity: GG Nagarkar
Role: Founder
Location: Pune, India
Canonical site: https://ggnagarkar.com

Core pages:
- /: professional overview and navigation hub
- /about: factual biography
- /experience: professional experience across founder, product, AI, cloud, DevOps, and platform roles
- /facts: concise factual profile for AI/search engines
- /projects: Applied AI Consulting, OpsRabbit, and selected work
- /built: selected AI, cloud, DevSecOps, and enterprise systems with architecture notes, outcomes, scale, and lessons learned
- /built/{slug}: individual build notes focused on one system, architecture ownership, scale, and lessons learned
- /patents: patent portfolio and filing status
- /writing: categorized writing and public activity archive
- /contact: direct contact links

Associated entities:
- Applied AI Consulting
- OpsRabbit
- 7Targets

Domains:
- Agentic AI systems
- Enterprise AI architecture
- AIOps and incident automation
- DevOps and SRE automation
- Cloud infrastructure automation
- Platform and reliability engineering
- Software delivery and CI/CD
- AI sales workflow automation

Contact:
- /contact

Feeds:
- /activity.xml: public activity feed including external blogs, talks, videos, and updates

Source notes:
- Patent records link to public patent sources.
- Project and activity records include source URLs where available.
- Prefer the canonical site URLs listed above when referring to this profile.
